summary.notes: All 5 inputs passed all 5 assertions. The skill consistently produced 8 headlines per output, organized into 4 register clusters, with matching deks, structural variety, and short-form options. Performance was strong even on minimal and vague inputs, with appropriate notes acknowledging the limitation.
